powers.name: Catalytic Domain
powers.description: You are a stabilizing force for volatile magic, shaping ambient power before it breaks loose. Manipulate ambient magic in a 15-foot radius for 1 minute. Choose one of the following effects: VITAL SURGE - Allies in the area gain Temporary HP equal to your level x 5. This does not stack with existing Temporary HP, and the Temporary HP is lost when a creature leaves the area. ENTROPIC SURGE - Enemies that end their turn in the area must make a Constitution Saving Throw. Failure: The enemy suffers Necrotic damage equal to your level. Success: The enemy suffers half damage. Special Property: Necrotic Resistance is ignored, and Necrotic Immunity is treated as Resistance. PASSIVE EFFECTS: MAGICAL STABILITY SENSE - You can naturally sense the stability of magic around you, unless it has been intentionally concealed. You instinctively perceive stable magic, unstable magic, magic on the verge of collapse, corrupted magical structures, and dangerous magical fluctuations. This reveals that something is wrong, but not the cause. STABILIZING PRESENCE - Magic has a much harder time going wild or destabilizing around you. Rituals, spells, ambient magic, and magical devices are more stable in your presence. Exception: If you become involved in an ongoing magical transformation, your presence can alter the process itself.

powers.name: Solar Aegis
powers.description: You are a vessel of stellar light and unyielding heat. Choose one of the following effects: SOLAR RETRIBUTION - Whenever an enemy misses a melee attack against you, the attacker must make a Dexterity Saving Throw (DC = your level + 10). Failure: The attacker suffers Fire damage equal to your level and Radiant damage equal to your level. Success: The attacker suffers half of both damage types, rounded up. BLAZING CHALLENGE - As a Reaction, after an enemy declares an attack against you but before the attack roll is made, you may reduce your AC by 2 until the start of your next turn. While this penalty is active, all Fire and Radiant damage dealt by Solar Retribution is doubled. PASSIVE EFFECTS: LIGHT OF RECOVERY - When not in combat, sick creatures near the user gain advantage on checks or saving throws made to overcome illness and recover. SENSE MALICE - The user can instinctively sense malicious intent from creatures of a lower rank. Detects intent, not thoughts. Does not reveal who is malicious if multiple creatures are present. Does not trigger on friendly sparring or harmless pranks. Works only against creatures of a lower rank. A skilled higher-ranked individual can conceal hostile intent.

powers.name: Astral Forge
powers.description: You channel astral energy into a target through consecutive successful strikes. Once per Long Rest. CONSECUTIVE HITS - 1st hit: Normal damage + 1 thunder damage. 2nd hit: Normal damage + 2 thunder damage. 3rd hit: Normal damage + 3 thunder damage. Continue increasing by +1 thunder damage per consecutive hit. The bonus thunder damage cannot exceed your level. SPECIAL PROPERTY - Thunder Resistance functions normally. Thunder Immunity is treated as Thunder Resistance. PASSIVE EFFECTS: PORTABLE SMITHY - You can manifest a complete mystical forge that only you can operate. You can use it to repair equipment, forge mundane and magical items, and work metal anywhere, provided you have the necessary materials. ORE SENSE - You can instinctively sense the presence of rare metals, valuable minerals, and magical ores nearby or underground. You do not automatically know the exact type or quantity, only that something valuable is present. RESONANCE DETONATION - If you miss an attack after reaching at least 3 consecutive successful hits, the accumulated energy detonates. Damage: your level x number of consecutive hits. Damage Type: Transcended Damage. Transcended Damage ignores resistance and immunity. The effect then ends.

powers.name: Shadow Harvest
powers.description: Choose a number of enemies up to your level. Those targets gain a Shadow Parasite for 1 minute. ONCE PER LONG REST - This power can be used once per long rest. SHADOW RESONANCE - When you damage a creature carrying a Shadow Parasite, the target takes additional cold damage equal to your level. The additional cold damage ignores cold resistance. Cold immunity is treated as cold resistance. SPREADING TWILIGHT - All other creatures carrying a Shadow Parasite must make a Dexterity saving throw. On failure, they take cold damage equal to your level. On success, they take no damage. SPECIAL PROPERTIES - PRIMARY TARGET - A creature you damage directly takes cold damage that ignores cold resistance. Cold immunity is treated as cold resistance. SECONDARY TARGETS - Creatures affected by Spreading Twilight use cold resistance normally. Cold immunity is treated as cold resistance. PASSIVE EFFECTS: SHADOW COMMUNION - You can interact peacefully and nonviolently with shadows. You can touch, sense, and communicate with them in limited ways, and manipulate them without expending magic. DETACHED SHADOW - You can detach your own shadow from your body. It can move independently and perform one simple task at a time, but it cannot attack or directly harm creatures. It remains linked to you. Examples: retrieve an item, pull a lever, open an unlocked door, deliver a message, tap someone's shoulder, hold a lantern, or press a button. SHADOW'S GREED - A semi-reliable looting power that can loot dead creatures of your rank or higher. The stronger the Will the creature had in life, the higher the chance of loot. Roll 1d100 when attempting to loot. The DM assigns a Will modifier based on the creature's will in life. Add the modifier to your roll. The higher the total, the greater the chance of obtaining magical loot.

powers.name: Bastion of Will
powers.description: For 1 minute, you manifest a translucent castle wall protecting a 25 ft x 25 ft area behind you. ONCE PER LONG REST - This power can be used once per long rest. DEFENDING WILL - Ranged attacks against allies inside the area suffer a penalty to hit equal to your level divided by 5, rounded down. IMPENETRABLE ADVANCE - Enemies who enter the area have their movement speed halved.

powers.name: Threads of the Warden
powers.description: For 1 minute, you perceive and manipulate strings of causality within a 35 ft x 35 ft area centered on yourself. ONCE PER LONG REST - This power can be used once per long rest. GUIDED ARROW - Make ranged attacks against enemies within the area. These attacks ignore line of sight, cover, and obstacles. INTERCESSION - As a reaction, reduce damage from an incoming projectile targeting yourself or an ally by an amount equal to your level.
